proves: pdf_oxide page30 live-orchestrator registration now fails closed before model transport when no Tau-owned override receipt is present.
The page30 review bundle still contains original page image, annotated candidate image, current extracted JSON, candidate presets, prompt payload, validation, terminal ledger, and receipt artifacts.
The generated terminal ledger validates with terminal_status=blocked_substrate and reason=page_orchestrator_registration_failed.
does_not_prove: A Tau-native PDF Lab model transport route exists.
A model-backed second-pass response was received.
Any page30 extraction defect is repaired.

commands.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/pdf_lab/run_page_second_pass_dag.py --pdf /mnt/storage12tb/extractor_corpus/source/standards/NIST_SP_800-53r5.pdf --manifest artifacts/pdf_lab/next_candidate_selection_page30_20260721T1235Z/candidate_manifest.json --sampled-cases artifacts/pdf_lab/next_candidate_selection_page30_20260721T1235Z/sampled_page_cases.json --out artifacts/pdf_lab/page30_live_transport_guard_20260721T1255Z --case-id page_case_0001_p0030 --ledger python/pdf_oxide/presets/document_families/nist_sp_800_53r5_promotion_ledger.json --apply-mode release --dpi 150 --model local-text --batch-id page30-live-transport-guard-20260721 --review-mode dry_run --scillm-preflight-mode dry_run --patch-mode dry_run --commit-mode dry_run --page-orchestrator-mode live --page-extract-timeout-s 90
